Example_EN: Of tea and coffee, I prefer the latter.
Example_CN: 茶和咖啡之中，我更喜欢后者。

Example_EN: The company will launch a new phone next month.
Example_CN: 公司下月将推出一款新手机。

Example_EN: Please mow the front lawn this weekend.
Example_CN: 请这个周末修剪前门草坪。

Example_EN: Please lay the table before dinner arrives.
Example_CN: 晚饭来前请摆好餐具。
MemoryTip: lay：放置（规则动词；勿与 lie 混淆）。

Example_EN: Add another layer of paint after the first dries.
Example_CN: 第一层干后再加一层油漆。

Collocation: lead a team;take the lead;lead to
Example_EN: She will lead the project team next term.
Example_CN: 下学期她将领导这个项目组。

Example_EN: A good team leader listens before deciding.
Example_CN: 好的组长先倾听再决定。

Example_EN: The club improved under her strong leadership.
Example_CN: 在她有力的领导下俱乐部改善了。

Example_EN: She plays the leading role in the school play.
Example_CN: 她在校剧中演主角。

Collocation: autumn leaf;turn over a new leaf;leaf of
Example_EN: An autumn leaf fell onto the wet pavement.
Example_CN: 一片秋叶落在潮湿人行道上。

Example_EN: Our school team joined the local football league.
Example_CN: 我校队加入了本地足球联赛。

Example_EN: Do not lean against the freshly painted wall.
Example_CN: 不要靠在刚刷完漆的墙上。

Example_EN: Online tools support language learning at home.
Example_CN: 在线工具支持在家学语言。

Example_EN: He bought a brown leather jacket for winter.
Example_CN: 他买了一件棕色皮夹克过冬。

Collocation: give a lecture;attend a lecture;lecture on
Example_EN: She will give a lecture on climate change tomorrow.
Example_CN: 她明天将就气候变化做一场讲座。

Example_EN: Get legal advice before you sign the contract.
Example_CN: 签合同前先寻求法律意见。

Example_EN: The bridge has a famous local legend.
Example_CN: 这座桥有著名的本地传说。

Example_EN: New legislation protects workers from unfair dismissal.
Example_CN: 新法律保护工人免受不公平解雇。

Example_EN: Reading is her favourite leisure activity.
Example_CN: 阅读是她最喜欢的休闲活动。

Example_EN: Measure the length of the table before you buy cloth.
Example_CN: 买布前先量桌子长度。

Example_EN: She has liberal views on education reform.
Example_CN: 她对教育改革持开明观点。

Collocation: driving licence;licence to;apply for a licence
Example_EN: You need a driving licence to hire a car.
Example_CN: 租车需要驾驶执照。
MemoryTip: 英式 licence（名词）；美式 license。

Collocation: lift the lid;jar lid;put a lid on
Example_EN: Please put the lid back on the jam jar.
Example_CN: 请把果酱瓶盖盖回去。

Example_EN: A healthy lifestyle includes sleep, food and exercise.
Example_CN: 健康生活方式包括睡眠、饮食和运动。

Collocation: in a lifetime;lifetime achievement;once in a lifetime
Example_EN: Seeing the Northern Lights was a once-in-a-lifetime trip.
Example_CN: 看见北极光是一生一次的旅行。

Example_EN: Poor lighting makes reading in this room difficult.
Example_CN: 这间房光线差，阅读困难。

Example_EN: It is likely to rain later this afternoon.
Example_CN: 今天下午晚些时候可能下雨。

Example_EN: Please observe the speed limit near the school.
Example_CN: 请遵守学校附近的限速。

Example_EN: Honest people know their limitations and ask for help.
Example_CN: 坦诚的人了解自身局限并会求助。

Example_EN: There is a limited number of free tickets today.
Example_CN: 今天免费票数量有限。

Example_EN: Please click the link in your email to confirm.
Example_CN: 请点击邮件中的链接确认。

Example_EN: She put lip balm on before going outside.
Example_CN: 出门前她涂了润唇膏。

Example_EN: Shake the bottle until the liquid turns pink.
Example_CN: 摇瓶子直到液体变成粉色。

Example_EN: A good listener makes friends more easily.
Example_CN: 善于倾听的人更容易交朋友。

Example_EN: Computer literacy is now essential in many jobs.
Example_CN: 计算机素养如今对许多工作必不可少。

Example_EN: He literally ran all the way to the station.
Example_CN: 他真的一路跑到了车站。

Example_EN: She won a literary prize for her first novel.
Example_CN: 她因第一部小说获得文学奖。

Example_EN: He studies English literature at university.
Example_CN: 他在大学攻读英国文学。

Example_EN: Please buy two litres of milk on your way home.
Example_CN: 回家路上请买两升牛奶。

Example_EN: The café always has lively music on Fridays.
Example_CN: 这家咖啡馆周五总有热闹音乐。

Collocation: make a living;living room;cost of living
Example_EN: Artists often struggle to make a living from paintings.
Example_CN: 艺术家常难以靠画画谋生。

Example_EN: Please help me load these boxes into the van.
Example_CN: 请帮我把这些箱子装进货车。

Collocation: bank loan;take out a loan;loan to
Example_EN: They took out a bank loan to buy a flat.
Example_CN: 他们贷款买了公寓。

Collocation: locate a place;hard to locate;locate in
Example_EN: Can you locate the meeting room on this map?
Example_CN: 你能在这张地图上找到会议室吗？

Example_EN: Please share the exact location of the restaurant.
Example_CN: 请分享这家餐厅的确切位置。

Collocation: lock the door;bike lock;under lock and key
Example_EN: Please lock the door when you leave the house.
Example_CN: 离开房子时请锁门。

Collocation: keep a log;log in;log of wood
Example_EN: Please keep a log of every phone call today.
Example_CN: 请记录今天每通来电。

Example_EN: The plan fails by simple logic and basic maths.
Example_CN: 按简单逻辑和基础数学，这计划行不通。

Example_EN: Arriving early is the logical way to avoid stress.
Example_CN: 早到是减少压力的合乎逻辑做法。

Example_EN: The company logo appears on every uniform.
Example_CN: 公司标志出现在每套制服上。

Example_EN: She felt lonely during her first week abroad.
Example_CN: 出国第一周她感到孤单。

Collocation: in a loop;loop of string;loop around
Example_EN: Tie the string in a loop around the parcel.
Example_CN: 把绳子在包裹上绕成一个圈。

Example_EN: These trousers feel too loose around the waist.
Example_CN: 这条裤子腰部太松。
MemoryTip: loose：松的；勿与 lose 混淆。

Example_EN: The bill was debated in the House of Lords.
Example_CN: 该法案在上议院进行了辩论。

Example_EN: A delivery lorry blocked the narrow street for an hour.
Example_CN: 一辆送货卡车堵了窄街一小时。

Example_EN: The family felt a deep sense of loss after the move.
Example_CN: 搬家后全家感到深深失落。

Example_EN: If you get lost, ask at the information desk.
Example_CN: 如果迷路，请到服务台询问。

Example_EN: He bought a lottery ticket for the first time.
Example_CN: 他第一次买了彩票。

Example_EN: Please do not speak loudly in the library.
Example_CN: 请不要在图书馆大声说话。

Example_EN: She is a music lover who collects old records.
Example_CN: 她是收藏老唱片的音乐爱好者。

Example_EN: Shops lower the price after the holiday season.
Example_CN: 节后商店会降价。

Example_EN: A loyal friend stays with you in difficult times.
Example_CN: 忠诚的朋友在困难时陪伴你。

Example_EN: Staff showed loyalty to the company during the crisis.
Example_CN: 危机中员工对公司表现出忠诚。

Collocation: lung disease;deep into the lungs;lung cancer
Example_EN: Smoking damages the lungs over many years.
Example_CN: 多年吸烟损害肺部。

Example_EN: They stayed in a luxury hotel by the lake.
Example_CN: 他们住在湖边豪华酒店。

Example_EN: The children loved the magician's magic trick.
Example_CN: 孩子们喜欢魔术师的魔术戏法。

Example_EN: The silent snowfall created a magical moment.
Example_CN: 无声飘雪营造出神奇时刻。

Example_EN: The delay was mainly because of road works.
Example_CN: 延误主要因为道路施工。

Example_EN: Please maintain contact with your personal tutor.
Example_CN: 请与你的个人导师保持联系。

Example_EN: Regular car maintenance prevents expensive repairs.
Example_CN: 定期保养汽车可避免昂贵修理。

Example_EN: Traffic is a major problem in large cities.
Example_CN: 交通是大城市的主要问题。

Example_EN: The vast majority of students passed the exam.
Example_CN: 绝大多数学生通过了考试。

Example_EN: More male students chose engineering this year.
Example_CN: 今年更多男学生选择了工程。

Collocation: shopping mall;mall car park;at the mall
Example_EN: We met friends at the shopping mall after school.
Example_CN: 放学后我们在购物中心里见朋友。

Example_EN: How did you manage to finish so quickly?
Example_CN: 你怎么设法完成得这么快？

Example_EN: Good time management reduces stress before exams.
Example_CN: 良好时间管理能减轻考前压力。

Example_EN: Please ask the manager if you need a refund.
Example_CN: 如需退款请找经理。

Example_EN: Please speak in a polite manner to older guests.
Example_CN: 请对年长客人礼貌说话。

Example_EN: The factory will manufacture electric bikes next year.
Example_CN: 工厂明年将生产电动自行车。

Example_EN: A leading car manufacturer opened a plant nearby.
Example_CN: 一家领先汽车制造商在附近开了工厂。

Collocation: write in the margin;profit margin;narrow margin
Example_EN: Write your comments in the margin of the page.
Example_CN: 把评语写在页边空白处。

Example_EN: The marketing campaign increased sales by twenty percent.
Example_CN: 营销活动使销量增长百分之二十。

Example_EN: They celebrated twenty years of happy marriage.
Example_CN: 他们庆祝了二十年美满婚姻。

Example_EN: A mass of people waited outside the stadium gates.
Example_CN: 一大群人在体育场门外等候。

Example_EN: They spent a massive amount of money on repairs.
Example_CN: 他们在修缮上花了一大笔钱。

Example_EN: She hopes to master British English within two years.
Example_CN: 她希望两年内掌握英式英语。

Example_EN: He called his team mate for help after the match.
Example_CN: 比赛后他打电话找队友帮忙。

Example_EN: Please bring reading material for the long train journey.
Example_CN: 长途火车请带阅读材料。

Example_EN: Our maths teacher explains problems clearly.
Example_CN: 我们的数学老师讲解题目很清楚。

Collocation: it does not matter;subject matter;matter of
Example_EN: It does not matter if you arrive a little late.
Example_CN: 稍微晚到一点没关系。

Example_EN: The maximum speed on this road is fifty miles per hour.
Example_CN: 这条路最高限速每小时五十英里。

Example_EN: The city mayor opened the new library yesterday.
Example_CN: 市长昨天为新图书馆揭幕。

Collocation: by means of;means of transport;a means to
Example_EN: Emails are a quick means of communication at work.
Example_CN: 邮件是工作中快捷的沟通手段。

Example_EN: I cooked dinner; meanwhile, she set the table.
Example_CN: 我做晚饭；与此同时，她摆餐具。
Synonym: at the same time;in the meantime

Example_EN: Please measure the length of the window carefully.
Example_CN: 请仔细测量窗户长度。

Example_EN: The tailor took measurements for my new suit.
Example_CN: 裁缝为我的新西装量了尺寸。

Example_EN: The locking mechanism on the door needs repair.
Example_CN: 门锁装置需要修理。

Example_EN: She won a gold medal in the swimming race.
Example_CN: 她在游泳比赛中获得金牌。

Example_EN: Social media spreads news faster than newspapers.
Example_CN: 社交媒体传播新闻比报纸更快。
MemoryTip: media：媒体（medium 的复数常用作集合）。

Example_EN: Seek medical advice if the pain continues.
Example_CN: 若疼痛持续请寻求医疗建议。
